ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-21-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-21-2021 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On The Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or Further Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-19-2021 Continued To Jun-21-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jessica Novotny, Esq., counsel for David Berrent, Administrator (appearing by video conference).

Court and counsel review the administration of estate. Ms. Novotny reports that the estate should be in a position to file the First and Final Account shortly. The Court continues the matter to June 21, 2021 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. If the First and Final Account - or Petition and Report to approve status of administration - is filed one week before that date, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
